overview: ShiftWest is a minimalist streetwear online store for a Tiruppur-based brand. Customers browse products by category, add to cart, and checkout via WhatsApp. A hidden admin panel lets the owner manage products and categories with changes persisted in the backend.
features: Product browsing with category filter tabs
Add to cart with item counter
WhatsApp checkout with formatted order message
Hidden admin panel (5 logo clicks + password)
Full CRUD for products and categories
Persistent backend storage via Motoko canister
